visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a blue denim flat cap, and a white Apple-branded hoodie speaks energetically to the camera. He stands in a bright indoor room with a round gold-rimmed mirror and a curtained window in the background. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up product showcase of three iPhone 17 Pro models in vibrant orange, silver, and dark navy blue. (3) Transitions to a high-angle shot of hands holding a smartphone, demonstrating a camera zoom interface that focuses on a black handheld gimbal stabilizer. (4) A sequence of cutaways displays various iPhone models, specifically highlighting the single-lens design of a white iPhone Air and comparing it with the triple-lens Pro model. (5) Close-up shots focus on the bottom edges of different phones, highlighting the USB-C ports and side profiles. (6) A thin white MagSafe battery pack is shown being magnetically snapped onto the back of a slim phone held sideways. (7) The final phase shows the man in a different indoor setting, a retail mobile phone store with multiple branded display cases for Vivo and Oppo in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: iPhone17全系列 發表會沒說的事. [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 第一個 iPhone 17 pro. [Variety]: iPhone 17 pro. (3) [Subtitle]: 它是4倍光學變焦鏡頭. (4) [Subtitle]: 8倍光學品質變焦 是透過裁切達到無損畫質. (5) [Subtitle]: iPhone air 機身中框是鈦金屬. [Variety]: (iPhone air). (6) [Subtitle]: 雖然呢 iPhone 17 Pro系列跟iPhone air 都是A19 pro晶片. (7) [Subtitle]: 但pro系列的GPU是6核心 air呢則是5核心. [Variety]: iPhone 17 pro. (8) [Subtitle]: iPhone 17 Pro系列是USB3.0 但是呢iPhone 17跟air 是USB2.0. [Variety]: (iPhone 17). (9) [Subtitle]: iPhone air是MagSafe電池 其他的iPhone 是無法使用的. [Variety]: 45瓦有線快充. (10) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家 買手機到米可. [Logo]: 米可.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator speaking, 3 distant passers-by visible in the background of store shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with glasses, wearing a blue denim flat cap and a white hoodie with a rainbow Apple logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor domestic setting with a modern mirror and soft lighting, transitioning to a bright retail electronics store with glass display counters and branded smartphone signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice begins speaking in Mandarin Chinese with a fast speech rate and high vocal arousal. A syncopated, mid-tempo electronic BGM with a strong synthetic beat kicks in simultaneously. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX signals a visual transition; the male narrator continues his professional yet casual delivery, describing the Pro models. (3) A digital 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of a specific tech spec. The BGM maintains a consistent intensity and major tonality. (4) Multiple short, percussive sound effects occur in rapid succession during the quick montage of phone colors. (5) The male voice maintains high dominance and clarity as he explains the USB-C differences, with the electronic music swelling slightly in the background before the final brand endorsement call-to-action.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Dumps -> Strategic Comparison -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide insider or less-discussed technical details comparing the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone 17 Air models to inform potential buyers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation and visual logo placement for a mobile retail brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy technical explainer optimized for short-form social media consumption with frequent visual transitions and informative overlays.
